title: EXTRASTAR Rechargeable Table Lamp, Cordless Lamp 3 Color Dimmable, Metal Touch Bedside Lamp for Living Room Bedroom Office Study-White
features: 【Simple and Compact Design】Simple and modern look, compact design for easy installation. Made of sturdy aluminum alloy, scratch resistant, the cordless table lamp is a perfect addition to your space like living room, bedroom, office, study, bar, cafe, hotel or restaurant.

【Color Temperature Adjustable】Whether you need a cozy atmosphere for relaxation or a bright light for reading, the portable lamp has you covered. You can choose from 3 color temperature: warm light 3000K, neutral light 4200K and cold light 6500K.
【Sensitive Touch Lamp】 You can easily set the light mode to match your preferences with just a touch of a button. Long press to adjust the brightness, short press to adjust the color temperature.

【USB Rechargeable Lamp】Equipped with a rechargeable battery, the table lamp can be simply powered via the included USB cable, and offers a power output of 5V 1A, ensuring reliable and long-lasting performance.

【Functional and Versatile】Whether you use it as a bedside lamp, a portable lighting solution, or a stylish addition to your living room decor, this rechargeable table lamp is versatile and functional.
description: Product Description EXTRASTAR LED Cordless Dimmable Table Lamp with USB Rechargeable Height Adjustable Led Bedside Lamp LED Table Lamp Dimmable with 3 Color Temperatures Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Is the table lamp waterproof? No, the usb desk lamp has an IP20, is not waterproof for use. Is the led bedside lamp battery operated and can it be recharged? The led desk lamp is not battery operated, however can be rechargeable with the usb cable provided which will be more convenient. Can be dimmable the rechargeable desk lamp? You can choose from 3 color temperature: warm light 3000K, neutral light 4200K and cold light 6500K. In addition you can also dim the light. Is it possible to adjust the height of the table lamp? Of course you can adjust the height of the lamp from 23.5cm to 37.5cm to ensure that you can always enjoy a comfortable reading experience.
